steps.t: You should defeat dragon-kind on the path to Stormwall, which lies north-east of Skarháld.
You should search for the entrance to Stormwall, high in the mountains north-east of Skarháld.
Stormwall lies high in the mountains northeast of Skarháld. You should defeat enemies in Stormwall and find the source of all these beasts.
Stormwall lies high in the mountains north-east of Skarháld. You should examine the spider corpse you found in Stormwall.
